title: Call: Which of the following is a feature of American options?...
summary: Identify American options as exercisable at any time before expiration.
prompt: Which of the following is a feature of American options?

options.text: Measures ability to meet short-term obligations
American options can be exercised at any time before their expiration date,

solution: American options can be exercised at any time before their expiration date, unlike European options, which can only be exercised at expiration. [[24]]
